titleStmt.title: SII 5.756: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 756. (A.R. No. 192 of 1895). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SHRINE IN THE AMBALANATHESVARA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tirumakaḷpolap perunilac celviyu n=ta nakke yurimai pūṇṭamai maṉakkoḷak kān=ta ḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkaināṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyu nuḷampa
pāṭiyu n=ta ṭikapāṭiyuṅ kuṭamalaināṭuṅ kollamuṅ kaliṅkamu meṇṭicai pukaṭara vīḻamaṇṭalamu miraṭṭapāṭi yeḻaraiyilakkamu n=ti ṇṭiṟal veṉṟi ta
ṇṭāṟ koṇṭu taṉṉeḻil vaḷaruḻiyu ḷelāyāṇṭu toḻutakai viḷaṅkum yāṇṭey ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarāja kesaripanma rāṉa śrīrājarā
jade varkku yāṇṭu 2 10 7 Āvatu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmade yam nikarilicoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalattu coḻen=ti raciṅka Īcuvarattu Akanāḻikai civa
brāhma ṇar mahātevan bhavākra ṇiyum caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ Aṭikaḷum nārāyaṇaṉ kūttaṉum nakka ṉampalavanum Ayyaṉ vā
sude vaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūr pūvaṉ colai cūraṉpakkal koṇṭa paḻa ṅkācu 10 2 Ikkācu paṉṉiraṇṭuṅ koṇṭa pa
ricāvatu Ivvūr śrīkayilāyattu Āḻvārkku candrādityavat nicatam Uḻakku ney yaṭṭit tiruviḷakku Erippomākavum Ikkācu pa
ṉṉiraṇṭukkum Inney Uḻakkum candrādi (t)tyavat Erippomāṉom Ivvaṉaivom colai cūraṉukku Ipparicu Eriyātu viṭil
Aṉṟāḻ koviṉukku Iraṇṭu kācu taṇṭamum paṭṭup piṉṉaiyum Ipparicey nāṅka(ka)ḷum Eṅkaḷ Aṉvayattā
rum Erippomākavum Iccoḻendra ciṅka Īśva rattu Eṅkaḷ Arcca nāpokap paṅkukaḷ Oṟṟiyum vilaiyum dharmmadā ṉamum Ittiruviḷa
kkuc cuṭṭi vaippomākavum Ipparicu Oṭṭik kalmel veṭṭuviccuk kuṭuttom mahā tevaṉbhavāgri ṇiyum caṅkaranārāyaṇaṉ Aṭikaḷum
nārāyaṇaṉ kūttaṉum nakkaṉ Ampalavaṉum Ayyaṉ vāsude vaṉum Ivvaṉaivom colai cūraṉukku coḻendrasiṁheśva ram Eṭukkak koṇṭa kā
cu paṉṉiraṇṭukku Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭi Iṭṭukkuṭutteṉ nakkaṉ Ampalavaṉeṉ Ivai yeṉ ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi .
Digital edition of SII 5.756 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
